## Checklist
- [ ] Workflow tested in a non-production repository
- [ ] Documentation updated (docs/ folder)
- [ ] Example added/updated (examples/ folder)
- [ ] No breaking changes OR breaking changes documented
- [ ] Inputs have sensible defaults
